title: Guioa macropetala
taxonomy: Guioa macropetala is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a member of the genus Guioa, which is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The Sapindaceae family, also known as the soapberry family, consists of over 1,500 species of trees and shrubs. Guioa macropetala is a small to medium-sized tree that is often found growing in dense forests. The classification of Guioa macropetala is also recognized by its unique characteristics and features within the Sapindaceae family.
